pattern: The allowed operation can clear any subset of set bits in a single element, so any bit present anywhere can be made to survive an odd number of times, making the answer the OR of all elements.
hints: The operation nums[i] AND (nums[i] XOR x) can only turn bits off, never on, and you choose which to clear.
Since you can clear arbitrary bits in any element, you control the parity of every bit across the whole array.
Any bit that appears in at least one number can be kept an odd number of times, so the maximum XOR is simply the bitwise OR of all elements.

stress.description: large random array; answer is OR of all
stress.note: verifies linear OR scan handles large inputs
